news.title: Adobe (ADBE) Buys Topaz Labs As It Expands Agentic AI Partnerships
news.summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Topaz Labs, a specialist in AI-based image and video enhancement tools. The company is extending its Firefly and Creative Cloud AI features while pursuing deeper partnerships with Accenture, Omnicom, WPP, Microsoft, and Anthropic.
